description: Integrate Nx Witness VMS with an external Incident Response Platform by configuring two Event Rules. Configure an Automated Storage Health Alert triggered by 'Storage Failure' (Any server) that performs a POST HTTP request to https://ops-api.internal/webhooks/health with the body {"type": "CRITICAL_FAILURE", "component": "Storage", "server": "{event.sourceName}", "timestamp": "{event.time}"}. Also configure an Operator Panic Button using a 'Soft Trigger' named 'Panic Alert' (Bell icon, available to all users and cameras) that performs a POST HTTP request to https://ops-api.internal/webhooks/panic with the body {"priority": "HIGH", "alert_type": "PANIC_BUTTON", "triggered_by": "{user.name}", "camera_id": "{event.cameraId}"}. Login with admin/Admin1234! if prompted.
